headline: Crown Castle: 22% IRR On Longer-Term Defensive Covered Calls
summary: Crown Castle Inc. trades 23% below our fair value, and the covered call provides a very solid return profile. Read more on CCI stock here.

headline: American Tower (AMT) Faces A Valuation Test, Is It Undervalued?
summary: American Tower (AMT) has been drawing attention after recent share price pressure, with the stock down over the past month and past 3 months, prompting investors to reassess the tower REIT’s current valuation and fundamentals. See our latest analysis for American Tower. At the latest share price of US$167.06, American Tower’s recent 1 month share price return of 5.11% and year to date share price return of 4.43% sit against a 1 year total shareholder return decline of 23.39%. This indicates...
